title: Link's Vanilla+
description: A Modpack designed to make vanilla run better with quality of life additions and optimization mods, can also be used as a foundation for other packs!
body:
A Modpack designed to make vanilla run better with quality of life additions and optimization mods, can also be used as a foundation for other packs!

This pack is designed to be an improvement of vanilla, alongside being a good base/platform to build upon if you want to: with this in mind if anyone wants to use my pack as a foundation I approve of it, I do so for my own packs as is.
